results.title: BAN vs AUS, 1st ODI 2026: Squad, Match Date, Time, Venue & Schedule, Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026
results.description: Get the Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 official schedule of 1st ODI! Check Bangladesh vs Australia 1st ODI match timings 2:00 PM (Local), (1:30 PM IST), squad, players list, and venue (Shere Bangla National Stadium, Dhaka) details. Stay updated with IndiaCricketSchedule.com for latest match details. Bangladesh vs Australia, 1st ODI, Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 - Bangladesh Cricket team will play 1st ODI of 3 ODIs matches of Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 Series against Australia Cricket Team , where the 1st ODI will be played on Tuesday, June 09, 2026. The BAN vs AUS, 1st ODI match will be played at Shere Bangla National Stadium, Dhaka, and will get started at 8:00 AM GMT, and 2:00 PM Local. The toss of the match will be done 30 minutes before the start of the match at 1:30 PM Local. The Bangladesh cricket team will be captained by Mehidy Hasan Miraz in the match and the Australia cricket team will be captained by Josh Inglis. Here are the full details of the Bangladesh vs Australia, 1st ODI 2026 Match Schedule and Timing, Captain and Players List. Australia vs Bangladesh Key Head-to-Head ODI Facts ODIs: Australia has won 20 of 22 matches nearly every encounter, with Bangladesh's sole ODI victory occurring in 2005 at Cardiff. results.title: TN Committed to Creating Transparent, Policy-Driven environment for energy investors: Minister
results.description: Tamil Nadu government is committed to establishing a transparent, policy-driven environment for energy sector investors, emphasising the state's potential to become a leading hub for green hydrogen and offshore wind energy project development

results.title: DNA tests to identify bodies of Visakhapatnam Steel Plant accident victims
results.description: Three of the eight workers who died in the accident at Visakhapatnam Steel Plant in Andhra Pradesh have been identified, while DNA tests will be conducted to identify the remaining bodies, officials said on Tuesday.

results.title: Odisha Tops India in Skill Competition with 57 Medals, Says CM Mohan Majhi
results.description: #ସ ୍କିଲ_ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାରେ_ଓଡ଼ିଶା_ଶୀର୍ଷରେ ମୋଦି ସରକାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ପୂରଣ କରିବା ଅବସରରେ ଅଭିଭାଷଣ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋହନ ମାଝୀ। ଅମୃତ ୨.୦ ଯୋଜନାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସାରା ଦେଶରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ସ୍ଥାନ ଅଧିକାର କରିଛି। ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ ସ୍କିଲ ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ୫୭ଟି ପଦକ ସହ ଦେଶରେ ଶୀର୍ଷ ସ୍ଥାନ ଅଧିକାର କରିଛି ବୋଲି କହିଛନ୍ତି ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ। On the occasion of the completion of 12 years of the Central Government led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi addressed a public programme highlighting key achievements. He stated that Odisha has secured the top position in the country under the Amrit 2.0 scheme. The Chief Minister further informed that Odisha has achieved remarkable success in the India Skill Competition by winning a total of 57 medals, ranking first in the nation. He said these achievements reflect the state’s growing focus on skill development and effective implementation of welfare programmes. #OdishaSkills #IndiaSkillCompetition #OdishaTops #MohanCharanMajhi #NarendraModi #SkillDevelopment #AmritMission #OdishaNews #BreakingNews #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: My father’s dream : Manav Suthar on emotional India Test debut
results.description: New Chandigarh : Left-arm spinner Manav Suthar has described his Test debut for India as a deeply emotional and long-cherished moment, calling it the fulfilment of a dream that he and his family had nurtured since the beginning of his cricketing journey. Suthar made his debut in the one-off Test against Afghanistan in New Chandigarh, [...] The post My father’s dream : Manav Suthar on emotional India Test debut appeared first on KalingaTV .
